decision_question.question: Should this auto insurance claim for $8,400 be approved for direct payment to the repair facility?
decision_question.scope: Single-incident property damage claim. Excludes liability determination and subrogation.

ai_prediction.output_summary: Claim matches low-fraud-risk profile. Damage estimate within expected range for reported incident type. Recommend approval.
ai_prediction.known_limitations: Model trained on claims filed 2021-2024. Limited exposure to post-2025 repair cost inflation.

options_considered.description: Approve claim and authorize direct payment of $8,400 to repair facility.
pros: Confidence score 0.87 exceeds GREEN threshold of 0.80
Damage estimate consistent with reported incident
Claimant history shows no prior fraud indicators
cons: Payment amount above $5,000 automatic approval floor
Repair facility is new network entrant, limited history
options_considered.estimated_impact: Settlement within 48 hours. Customer satisfaction preserved.

options_considered.description: Defer approval and request supplemental documentation from claimant.
pros: Reduces residual risk from new repair facility
cons: Confidence score does not warrant deferral

items.description: Claim intake form: incident date, location, reported damage description
Third-party damage estimate: $8,400 for rear-end collision repair
Claimant policy record: active coverage, no lapse, deductible met
Fraud risk score: 0.06 (low risk). Model: fraud-detector-v2.1

key_risks.risk: Repair facility is a new network entrant with limited payment history
key_risks.mitigation: Payment issued via standard network escrow. Release contingent on repair completion confirmation.

key_risks.risk: Fraud detector confidence rated medium due to new entrant
key_risks.mitigation: Claim amount below threshold requiring secondary fraud review. Claimant history clean.

risk_posture.residual_risk_statement: Low residual risk. Payment escrow mitigates new-facility exposure. Fraud score within acceptable range for claim amount.

decision_outcome.rationale_summary: Confidence score of 0.87 exceeds the GREEN threshold of 0.80 for claims in this category. All four evidence items are complete. Fraud risk score is low. Damage estimate is consistent with reported incident. Residual risk is mitigated by payment escrow. Decision owner has authority to approve claims up to $10,000 without secondary review.
decision_outcome.reasoning_reconstruction: Agent evaluated claim CLM-2026-84471 against autoapproval policy. Confidence 0.87 is GREEN. Fraud score 0.06 is within bounds. Damage estimate within expected range. Gate 1 routine approval. Action: authorize payment of $8,400 to repair facility via escrow.

decision_owner.name: Claims Processing Agent
decision_owner.role: Automated adjudicator operating under delegation from Senior Claims Manager

structured_sources.query_ref: SELECT coverage, deductible, status FROM policies WHERE policy_id = 'POL-7723819'

confidence_assessment.zone_rationale: Confidence score 0.87 exceeds the GREEN threshold of 0.80 defined for auto property damage claims under $10,000. All evidence items rated complete. Routine approval authorized.

gate_classification.gate_rationale: Confidence is GREEN, claim amount is within agent authority, all evidence is complete, fraud score is low. No elevated review or escalation required.

affected_systems.impact: Payment of $8,400 authorized to repair facility via escrow on approval
Claim status updated to approved, claimant notification triggered

ai_assistance_disclosure.tool_purpose: Damage estimate validation and fraud risk scoring
ai_assistance_disclosure.cautions: Model has limited exposure to post-2025 repair cost inflation. Estimates for high-labor repairs may be understated.
